title: Exekias, Amphora with Ajax and Achilles Playing a Game
topic_path: Exekias, Amphora with Ajax and Achilles Playing a Game

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the source of Exekias's subject matter on this Greek amphora?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bb6d94328a4d1f61127874bb5f84d9c3.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The decoration on this vase depicts Achilles and Ajax from the epic Greek poem The Illiad by Homer.

assessment_items.question_content:
**In this detail, how did the artist create the intricate figures on the shield of Ajax?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/63e444f96bf06350b38a81de9cef4efd.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Interior details like the face and serpent on Ajax's shield were created by incising lines into the black slip areas to expose the natural color of the clay below.

choices.content: He incised lines into areas of black slip.
He used a syringe to draw linear details.
He drew thin lines of red slip over the black areas.
He used stamps to create repeated forms and patterns.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Signed by the potter [[☃ dropdown 1]] , this amphora is one of the finest examples of [[☃ dropdown 2]] .**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bb6d94328a4d1f61127874bb5f84d9c3.jpg)
hints: A master of the black-figure technique, Exekias signed his name as both the potter and the painter of this amphora.

choices.content: vase painting in the Geometric Period.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which best describes the theme addressed by this scene?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Ajax and Achilles play a game of chance as a metaphor for life's unpredictable nature and the inability to control our fate.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Exekias's composition and rendering of the figures contributes what mood to the story?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The simplicity of Exekias's composition underscores a moment of relaxation between the two friends, but also suggests anxiety and reflection in the face of an unknown future.
Exekias's painting expresses all of the moods above.
